metadata.description: The Agentile methodology as Claude Code skills: spec-first, red-test-first, honesty-enforced agent development, plus navigation skills for the CitrateNetwork federation.

plugins.name: agentile
plugins.description: The Agentile methodology: feature specs, plansets, test planning, red-green work packages, refactor + mutation testing, documentation passes, retrospectives, journals, essays, and case studies.

plugins.name: citrate-federation
plugins.description: Navigating the CitrateNetwork federated repositories: orientation, truth hierarchy, manifest/drift discipline, and running projects across the federation.
